node.content-desc: Swipe down to reveal additional actions

node.text: Students, tomorrow labs will be occupied by placement. So kindly bring your laptop with full charge..

node.content-desc: 6th sem B sec unofficial, group profile icon

node.text: No NLP class for batch 1 today.
"You are an Android automation planner. The user wants to: \"{raw_task}\"\n\n" "Rewrite this as a numbered, step-by-
Meta might interview you this April.…
